company.segment_en: Data Center — the accelerated-compute platform that sets the price of AI silicon, and TSMC's anchor customer
company.segment_zh: 資料中心 — 替 AI 矽定價的加速運算平台，也是台積電的頭號客戶
company.blurb_en: How NVIDIA actually raises the realized price of compute, what you can watch it with, how much it makes from AI, and how ~100% of it rests on TSMC leading-edge silicon and CoWoS — the purest read on TSMC's single largest customer.
company.blurb_zh: NVIDIA 究竟怎麼提高已實現算力售價、能用什麼資料觀察、從 AI 賺到多少，以及這一切如何幾乎 100% 押在台積電先進製程與 CoWoS 上 — 對台積電最大單一客戶最純粹的判讀。

thesis_en: NVIDIA is the purest pricing-power story in AI compute — and TSMC's anchor customer. Raw FLOPs keep getting cheaper, yet NVIDIA's REALIZED price per unit of useful compute keeps rising: every generation (Hopper → Blackwell → Rubin) steps ASP up, it now sells $3M+ rack-scale systems instead of $30k chips, and CUDA locks the buyer in. Nearly 100% of that silicon is fabbed by TSMC on N4/N3 with CoWoS — so both NVIDIA's AI benefit and its binding constraint live inside TSMC's leading-edge and CoWoS capacity.
thesis_zh: NVIDIA 是 AI 算力中最純粹的定價權故事 — 也是台積電的頭號客戶。原始 FLOPs 年年變便宜，但 NVIDIA 每單位「有用算力」的已實現售價持續上升：每一個世代（Hopper → Blackwell → Rubin）都把 ASP 往上推，現在賣的是 300 萬美元以上的機櫃級整機而非 3 萬美元的單顆晶片，而 CUDA 把客戶牢牢鎖住。這些矽幾乎 100% 由台積電以 N4/N3 製造、用 CoWoS 封裝 — 因此 NVIDIA 的 AI 利益與它的綁定約束，都住在台積電的先進製程與 CoWoS 產能裡。
pricing_engine_note_en: generational ASP step-ups (Hopper→Blackwell→Rubin), rack-scale system selling and CUDA lock-in are doing the work — NVIDIA is a price-maker, not a price-taker
pricing_engine_note_zh: 世代 ASP 階梯（Hopper→Blackwell→Rubin）、機櫃級整機銷售與 CUDA 鎖定在推動 — NVIDIA 是定價者而非價格接受者

pricing_levers.name_zh: 世代 ASP 階梯（Hopper → Blackwell → Rubin）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Each new architecture is priced well above the one it replaces while delivering more performance/Watt. The annual cadence resets the price ceiling every year — a GB200 commands a large premium over H100, and Rubin will reset it again. Realized $/useful-FLOP rises despite raw-FLOP deflation.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 每一個新架構的定價都遠高於它取代的上一代，同時提供更高的效能/瓦。年度節奏每年重置價格天花板 — GB200 對 H100 收取大幅溢價，Rubin 會再重置一次。即使原始 FLOP 通縮，已實現每有效 FLOP 售價仍上升。
pricing_levers.observability_en: Data Center ASP trend in 10-Q revenue ÷ units, GTC product pricing, analyst accelerator models (SemiAnalysis).
pricing_levers.observability_zh: 10-Q 資料中心營收 ÷ 出貨量的 ASP 趨勢、GTC 產品定價、分析師加速器模型（SemiAnalysis）。
pricing_levers.source_en: NVIDIA GTC keynotes; NVIDIA 10-Q Data Center segment
pricing_levers.source_zh: NVIDIA GTC 主題演講；NVIDIA 10-Q 資料中心分部

pricing_levers.name_en: Rack-scale system selling (GB200 NVL72 / DGX), not chips
pricing_levers.name_zh: 機櫃級整機銷售（GB200 NVL72／DGX），而非單顆晶片
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: NVIDIA increasingly sells integrated rack systems (NVL72) and DGX/HGX platforms rather than bare GPUs. The unit of sale jumps from a ~$30-40k chip to a ~$3M+ rack, pulling NVLink, NVSwitch, trays and software into one ASP — a step-change in realized price per deployed unit.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: NVIDIA 越來越多賣的是整合機櫃系統（NVL72）與 DGX/HGX 平台，而非裸 GPU。銷售單位從約 3-4 萬美元的晶片，跳升到約 300 萬美元以上的機櫃，把 NVLink、NVSwitch、托盤與軟體一起納入單一 ASP — 每部署單位的已實現售價出現階躍。
pricing_levers.observability_en: System vs component revenue mix in earnings commentary; NVL72 / DGX shipment disclosures; ODM (Foxconn/Quanta) order flow.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: 法說中系統 vs 元件營收結構；NVL72／DGX 出貨揭露；ODM（鴻海/廣達）接單流。
pricing_levers.source_en: NVIDIA earnings calls; ODM order reporting
pricing_levers.source_zh: NVIDIA 法說會；ODM 接單報導

pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Two decades of CUDA, cuDNN, TensorRT, NIM microservices and a trained developer base make switching costly. Low price elasticity lets NVIDIA hold and raise price where a fungible-silicon vendor could not — the moat that underwrites every other lever.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 二十年的 CUDA、cuDNN、TensorRT、NIM 微服務與龐大的開發者基礎，讓轉換成本高昂。低價格彈性讓 NVIDIA 能在可替代矽供應商辦不到的情況下守住並提高價格 — 這是支撐其他所有槓桿的護城河。
pricing_levers.observability_en: Gross-margin durability across cycles; developer/CUDA download counts; share retention vs custom ASICs.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: 跨循環的毛利率韌性；開發者/CUDA 下載量；相對自研 ASIC 的市占保持。
pricing_levers.source_en: NVIDIA gross-margin trend; developer ecosystem disclosures
pricing_levers.source_zh: NVIDIA 毛利率趨勢；開發者生態揭露

pricing_levers.name_zh: 稀缺／配額溢價（供給受限）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Demand has run far ahead of CoWoS and HBM supply, so NVIDIA allocates rather than discounts. Constrained supply holds ASP firm and lets the newest, highest-priced parts clear first — realized price tracks supply tightness, not a falling rate card.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 需求遠遠超前 CoWoS 與 HBM 供給，因此 NVIDIA 用配額而非折讓。受限供給撐住 ASP，並讓最新、最高價的產品優先出清 — 已實現價格跟著供給鬆緊走，而非下滑的牌價表。
pricing_levers.observability_en: CoWoS / HBM lead times, GPU spot rents (vast.ai / market), NVIDIA 'supply-constrained' guidance language.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: CoWoS／HBM 交期、GPU 現貨租金（vast.ai／市場）、NVIDIA「供給受限」的指引措辭。
pricing_levers.source_en: TSMC CoWoS commentary; third-party GPU price trackers
pricing_levers.source_zh: 台積電 CoWoS 評論；第三方 GPU 價格追蹤

pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Bigger clusters drag along NVLink/NVSwitch, Quantum InfiniBand, Spectrum-X Ethernet and BlueField DPUs (post-Mellanox). Networking scales with cluster size and bills separately, raising the total realized price of an AI deployment above the accelerator line alone.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 更大的叢集會帶出 NVLink/NVSwitch、Quantum InfiniBand、Spectrum-X 乙太網路與 BlueField DPU（併購 Mellanox 後）。網路隨叢集規模放大、另計費，把一次 AI 部署的總已實現售價推高到加速器項目之上。
pricing_levers.observability_en: Networking revenue line in 10-Q; InfiniBand vs Ethernet mix; attach rate per GPU cluster.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: 10-Q 的網路營收項；InfiniBand vs 乙太網路結構；每 GPU 叢集的 attach 率。

pricing_levers.name_en: Software & recurring (AI Enterprise / DGX Cloud / Omniverse)
pricing_levers.name_zh: 軟體與週期性收入（AI Enterprise／DGX Cloud／Omniverse）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Per-GPU AI Enterprise subscriptions, DGX Cloud and Omniverse layer a value-based, recurring revenue stream on top of the silicon — a software margin that lifts blended realized price and is independent of any per-chip rate card.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 每 GPU 的 AI Enterprise 訂閱、DGX Cloud 與 Omniverse，在矽之上疊加一層價值定向、週期性的營收流 — 一種軟體利差，拉高混合後的已實現售價，且不受任何每晶片牌價牽制。
pricing_levers.observability_en: Software & services run-rate disclosures; AI Enterprise per-GPU pricing; DGX Cloud commitments.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: 軟體與服務年化揭露；AI Enterprise 每 GPU 定價；DGX Cloud 承諾。

data_sources.what_en: Data Center revenue, gross & operating margin, networking line, inventory & purchase commitments — the hard floor for the benefit estimate.
data_sources.what_zh: 資料中心營收、毛利與營益率、網路項、存貨與採購承諾 — 利益估計的硬底。

data_sources.name_zh: NVIDIA 法說會與投資人簡報
data_sources.what_en: Management framing of Blackwell/Rubin ramp, supply constraints, system vs component mix, and software run-rate.
data_sources.what_zh: 管理層對 Blackwell/Rubin 量產、供給限制、系統 vs 元件結構與軟體年化的措辭。

data_sources.name_zh: 雲端巨頭 capex 指引（微軟/Google/Meta/Amazon）
data_sources.what_en: The demand that leads NVIDIA Data Center revenue by a quarter or two — the single best forward indicator.
data_sources.what_zh: 領先 NVIDIA 資料中心營收約一兩季的需求 — 最佳的前瞻指標。

data_sources.what_en: Independent ASP, BOM and shipment estimates per accelerator — the cross-check on realized price and unit economics.
data_sources.what_zh: 各加速器獨立的 ASP、BOM 與出貨估計 — 對已實現價格與單位經濟的交叉驗證。

data_sources.what_en: Market GPU rental rates — a real-time proxy for accelerator scarcity that leads the allocation premium.
data_sources.what_zh: 市場 GPU 租金 — 加速器稀缺的即時 proxy，領先配額溢價。

data_sources.name_zh: 台積電營收與 CoWoS 產能揭露
data_sources.what_en: Leading-edge (N4/N3) mix and CoWoS capacity — the supply ceiling that caps NVIDIA's shippable units.
data_sources.what_zh: 先進製程（N4/N3）結構與 CoWoS 產能 — 限制 NVIDIA 可出貨量的供給天花板。

data_sources.name_zh: HBM 供給（SK 海力士／美光／三星）
data_sources.what_en: HBM3E/HBM4 capacity and qualification — the other binding input alongside CoWoS for every Blackwell/Rubin GPU.
data_sources.what_zh: HBM3E/HBM4 產能與驗證 — 與 CoWoS 並列、每顆 Blackwell/Rubin GPU 的另一個綁定輸入。

data_sources.name_zh: NVIDIA GTC 路線圖（Blackwell／Rubin 節奏）
data_sources.what_en: The annual product cadence that resets the ASP ceiling — confirms the timing of each generational step-up.
data_sources.what_zh: 每年重置 ASP 天花板的產品節奏 — 確認每一次世代階躍的時點。

benefit_estimates.method_zh: 資料中心營收年化（揭露值，年化）
benefit_estimates.basis_en: Unlike AWS, NVIDIA reports a Data Center segment directly. Annualizing the most recent disclosed quarter (~$45B) gives a ~$180B run-rate — and Data Center is now ~88-90% of NVIDIA's total revenue and effectively all AI. Annualization is the only projection; the segment itself is disclosed. Cross-references /payback for the demand-side coverage view.
benefit_estimates.basis_zh: 與 AWS 不同，NVIDIA 直接揭露資料中心分部。把最近一季揭露值（約 $45B）年化得到約 $180B 年化營收 — 而資料中心現在約占 NVIDIA 總營收 88-90%、實質上全為 AI。唯一的推估是年化動作；分部本身為揭露值。需求端覆蓋率視角見 /payback。

benefit_estimates.method_zh: 資料中心營益（利潤率視角）
benefit_estimates.basis_en: At a ~62-64% operating margin on the Data Center run-rate, AI operating income annualizes near $110-115B. This is a derived estimate (NVIDIA reports company-level, not segment-level, operating income) but anchored to disclosed margins.
benefit_estimates.basis_zh: 以資料中心年化營收約 62-64% 營益率計，AI 營益年化接近 $110-115B。此為推導估計（NVIDIA 揭露公司層級而非分部層級營益），但錨定在揭露的利潤率上。

benefit_estimates.method_zh: 軟體與服務週期性年化
benefit_estimates.basis_en: AI Enterprise per-GPU subscriptions, DGX Cloud and Omniverse — management has pointed to a software/services run-rate in the low-single-digit $B and rising. A small slice today, but a higher-margin, value-based layer that compounds.
benefit_estimates.basis_zh: AI Enterprise 每 GPU 訂閱、DGX Cloud 與 Omniverse — 管理層指出軟體/服務年化在個位數低端 $B 且持續上升。今日占比小，但屬高利差、價值定向、會複利成長的一層。

benefit_disclosure_en: NVIDIA reports Data Center revenue directly (near-pure AI); the only estimates are the operating-income split and the software run-rate. Cross-checked against op-income and software lenses.
benefit_disclosure_zh: NVIDIA 直接揭露資料中心營收（近乎純 AI）；唯一的估計是營益拆分與軟體年化。已用營益與軟體視角交叉驗證。

silicon_chain.note_en: The volume engine of the current cycle; large-die CoWoS-L + HBM3E make it entirely dependent on TSMC advanced packaging at scale.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 本循環的量產引擎；大尺寸 CoWoS-L＋HBM3E 使其在規模上完全依賴台積電先進封裝。

silicon_chain.role_zh: 次世代加速器（2026 路線圖）
silicon_chain.note_en: Forward roadmap — pushes NVIDIA onto TSMC N3 and the next CoWoS/HBM4 generation, deepening leading-edge dependence.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 前瞻路線圖 — 把 NVIDIA 推上台積電 N3 與次世代 CoWoS/HBM4，加深對先進製程的依賴。

silicon_chain.role_zh: 上一代訓練/推論加速器
silicon_chain.note_en: Still a large installed and shipping base; the generation that established the CoWoS bottleneck as the binding constraint.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 仍是龐大的安裝與出貨基礎；正是這一代讓 CoWoS 瓶頸成為綁定約束。

silicon_chain.role_zh: 與 GPU 搭配的 Arm CPU（Grace-Blackwell）
silicon_chain.note_en: The CPU half of the superchip — another TSMC leading-edge die that ships inside every GB200 rack.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 超級晶片的 CPU 一半 — 另一顆每個 GB200 機櫃內都會出貨的台積電先進製程晶粒。

silicon_chain.note_en: The fabric that makes NVL72 sell as one system — also TSMC-fabbed, and part of why the unit of sale (and ASP) keeps rising.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 讓 NVL72 能以單一系統出售的 fabric — 同樣由台積電製造，也是銷售單位（與 ASP）持續上升的原因之一。

silicon_chain.note_en: InfiniBand/Ethernet switches and BlueField DPUs (post-Mellanox) — the networking-attach lever, again on TSMC silicon.
silicon_chain.note_zh: InfiniBand／乙太網路交換器與 BlueField DPU（併購 Mellanox 後）— 網路 attach 槓桿，同樣跑在台積電矽上。

silicon_summary_en: Every Blackwell/Rubin/Hopper GPU, the Grace CPU and the NVLink/Spectrum networking are TSMC N3-N5 + CoWoS — NVIDIA is TSMC's single largest CoWoS customer.
silicon_summary_zh: 每顆 Blackwell/Rubin/Hopper GPU、Grace CPU 與 NVLink/Spectrum 網路全為台積電 N3-N5＋CoWoS — NVIDIA 是台積電最大的單一 CoWoS 客戶。
tsmc_read_en: Essentially 100% of NVIDIA's AI silicon — Blackwell/Rubin/Hopper GPUs, the Grace CPU, NVLink switches and networking — is fabbed by TSMC on N4/N3 and packaged with CoWoS. For TSMC, NVIDIA is the direct anchor customer: a top leading-edge buyer AND the single largest source of CoWoS demand. NVIDIA also aggregates the indirect demand of every hyperscaler that rents its GPUs (Amazon is a TSMC customer 'twice over' partly through NVIDIA). The binding constraint on NVIDIA's growth — CoWoS and HBM — sits inside TSMC's own capacity, so NVIDIA's pricing power and TSMC's pricing power are two ends of the same leading-edge scarcity.
tsmc_read_zh: NVIDIA 的 AI 矽 — Blackwell/Rubin/Hopper GPU、Grace CPU、NVLink 交換器與網路 — 幾乎 100% 由台積電以 N4/N3 製造、用 CoWoS 封裝。對台積電而言，NVIDIA 是直接的頭號客戶：頂級先進製程買家，也是 CoWoS 需求的最大單一來源。NVIDIA 同時匯聚了所有租用其 GPU 的雲端巨頭的間接需求（Amazon 之所以是台積電的「雙重」客戶，部分正是透過 NVIDIA）。NVIDIA 成長的綁定約束 — CoWoS 與 HBM — 就在台積電自己的產能裡，因此 NVIDIA 的定價權與台積電的定價權，是同一個先進製程稀缺的兩端。

cross_links.label_en: CapEx → Wafer Engine — turn the capex NVIDIA captures into implied TSMC wafer demand
cross_links.label_zh: CapEx → 晶圓引擎 — 把 NVIDIA 吃下的 capex 換算成隱含台積電晶圓需求

cross_links.label_en: Pricing Power Radar — the foundry ASP side of the same price stack
cross_links.label_zh: 議價能力雷達 — 同一價格堆疊的代工 ASP 端

cross_links.label_en: Capex Payback Radar — is the AI capex NVIDIA feeds on paying off yet?
cross_links.label_zh: 資本支出回本雷達 — 餵養 NVIDIA 的 AI capex 回本了沒？

cross_links.label_en: AI Compute Demand Radar — the accelerator demand NVIDIA supplies
cross_links.label_zh: AI 算力需求雷達 — NVIDIA 供給的加速器需求

cross_links.label_en: Rival Radar — TSMC's competitive position behind NVIDIA's silicon
cross_links.label_zh: 競爭者雷達 — NVIDIA 矽背後台積電的競爭格局

scenarios_seed.trigger_en: Rubin ships on schedule, Data Center run-rate clears $250B, gross margin holds above 72% as CUDA lock-in and the annual cadence keep ASP and share rising.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: Rubin 如期出貨，資料中心年化突破 $250B，毛利率守在 72% 以上，CUDA 鎖定與年度節奏持續推升 ASP 與市占。

scenarios_seed.trigger_en: Hyperscaler capex flattens YoY, GPU spot rents fall hard, and custom ASICs (Trainium/TPU/MTIA/Maia) take share — the scarcity premium and ASP compress.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: 雲端巨頭 capex 年增轉平，GPU 現貨租金重挫，自研 ASIC（Trainium/TPU/MTIA/Maia）搶走市占 — 稀缺溢價與 ASP 一起壓縮。

scenarios_seed.trigger_en: TSMC CoWoS and HBM allocation cap shippable units; NVIDIA can hold price but guides supply-constrained, and shipped units stay below demand.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: 台積電 CoWoS 與 HBM 配額限制可出貨量；NVIDIA 能守住價格卻指引供給受限，出貨量持續低於需求。

scenarios_seed.name_zh: 系統與軟體再定價勝出
scenarios_seed.trigger_en: Value migrates from per-chip ASP to rack-systems plus software (AI Enterprise/DGX Cloud); networking attach and software run-rate rise, lifting blended realized price even if per-GPU ASP plateaus.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: 價值從每晶片 ASP 移向機櫃系統加軟體（AI Enterprise／DGX Cloud）；網路 attach 與軟體年化上升，即使每 GPU ASP 進入高原仍推升混合已實現價格。

falsification_seed.en: NVIDIA Data Center gross margin falls for two straight quarters while DC revenue still grows — pricing power is eroding under ASIC/competitive pressure, not scaling.
falsification_seed.zh: 資料中心營收仍成長的同時，NVIDIA 資料中心毛利率連兩季下滑 — 定價權在 ASIC／競爭壓力下轉弱，而非擴張。

falsification_seed.en: Custom-silicon (Trainium/TPU/MTIA/Maia) share of new AI capacity rises materially while NVIDIA DC growth decelerates — the share-and-price moat is breaking.
falsification_seed.zh: 自研晶片（Trainium/TPU/MTIA/Maia）在新增 AI 產能的占比明顯上升，同時 NVIDIA 資料中心成長減速 — 市占與定價的護城河正在破。

falsification_seed.en: GPU spot rents collapse and stay low as supply normalizes — the scarcity / allocation premium is gone.
falsification_seed.zh: 隨供給正常化，GPU 現貨租金崩跌且持續低檔 — 稀缺／配額溢價消失。

watch_seed.en: NVIDIA Data Center revenue & gross margin (10-Q)
watch_seed.zh: NVIDIA 資料中心營收與毛利率（10-Q）

watch_seed.en: Hyperscaler capex guidance (MSFT/GOOG/META/AMZN) — leads DC revenue
watch_seed.zh: 雲端巨頭 capex 指引（微軟/Google/Meta/Amazon）— 領先資料中心營收

watch_seed.en: Blackwell / Rubin ramp & GTC roadmap cadence
watch_seed.zh: Blackwell／Rubin 量產與 GTC 路線圖節奏

watch_seed.en: CoWoS capacity & HBM (SK hynix / Micron) lead times
watch_seed.zh: CoWoS 產能與 HBM（SK 海力士／美光）交期
雲端機隊中自研 ASIC（Trainium/TPU/MTIA/Maia）占比

blind_spots_en: NVIDIA discloses Data Center revenue but not a precise training-vs-inference-vs-networking split — that breakdown here is estimated, and the run-rate annualizes a single quarter.
Node and packaging assignments (e.g. Rubin on N3, CoWoS-L) are from press / industry reporting, not TSMC/NVIDIA confirmation.
Live proxies (NVDA/TSM/AVGO equity) are sentiment context, deliberately kept out of the core pricing-power score.
blind_spots_zh: NVIDIA 揭露資料中心營收，但未揭露精確的訓練 vs 推論 vs 網路拆分 — 此處的拆分為估計，且年化是把單季年化。
節點與封裝對應（如 Rubin 用 N3、CoWoS-L）來自媒體／產業報導，非台積電/NVIDIA 確認。
即時 proxy（NVDA/TSM/AVGO 股價）為情緒情境，刻意排除在核心定價權分數之外。

live_proxies.name_zh: 台積電（TSM）— 供給端 proxy
博通（AVGO）— 自研 ASIC 競爭 proxy
